title: potentilla ferruginea
intro: Potentilla ferruginea, also known as Rusty cinquefoil, is a perennial plant species belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Potentilla ferruginea lie in its roots, leaves, and flowers, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues due to their anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Potentilla ferruginea include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of respiratory tract infections, and exhibit potential antiviral and anticancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically dried and used as a tea or tincture, while its flowers can be used in infusions or as a dried herb.
